title: How It Works
intro: From contract to release-safe integration in four practical steps.

steps.title: Define your contract
steps.detail: Create endpoint definitions in contracts/*.contract.json with request and response shapes.

steps.title: Generate typed artifacts
steps.detail: Produce deterministic models and helper outputs from the contract source.

steps.title: Wire Angular + backend
steps.detail: Connect generated outputs in Angular clients and backend handlers to keep both sides aligned.

steps.title: Check compatibility before release
steps.detail: Run contract diff checks to detect breaking API changes early in CI.

releaseChecks.title: Release checklist
items: Generated outputs are in sync with the contract.
No breaking changes without intentional version bump.
